market_context: Bounce confirmed and extended: SPY 751 (above the 742 health line), VIX 15.9, chips resumed their surge Monday and small caps just had their best H1 since 1991. Tape is risk-on. The week is catalyst-dense: FOMC minutes Wed Jul 8, jobless claims Thu, then the double-header Tue Jul 14 — June CPI (May ran hot at 4.2% YoY) AND big-bank earnings (JPM held). FOMC decision Jul 28-29 lands the same week QCOM/RIVN/AAPL report. Account is ~86% invested per the posture target; with only ~1.4k CZK free, this run manages winners into strength — sells fund the next buys. NOTE: friend's new positions (photos) did not come through — send tickers to fold them in.

position_actions.reason: 339.94 (+156 CZK), 1.5% from the first sell. Jul 14 is now a DOUBLE binary: JPM earnings AND June CPI print the same day, with May CPI running hot at 4.2%. If 345 doesn't print by Friday's close, trim half anyway. Stop 319.5 stays for the rest.
